title: Improve the journal event reading
body:
Fix the AddMatch/SeekTail conflict. This prevents reading
unnecessary journal entries which could cause errors.

Also wrap the sdjournal errors to provide better error messages.

Fixes #8125

lgtm, when reviewing i wondered if we should define a generic journal error like ErrNoSuchCtr in combination with the wraps in case in the future we need to detect the error cause.
